hero_subtitle: SFTY connects company registry checks into a single audit trail that preserves evidence and supports risk-based onboarding workflows for regulated digital asset businesses.

problem_title: Audit evidence weakens across disconnected company data
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve clear audit trails when company registry checks and corporate due diligence remain scattered across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows onboarding reviews and complicates defensible compliance decisions for VASPs handling complex counterparty verification.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects company registry data, KYB outputs, reviewer actions and decision logs into one traceable workflow so compliance teams maintain a clear, defensible audit trail for onboarding reviews.
workflow_title: From company registry checks to approval
workflow_description: SFTY records company registry data and provider checks into structured workflows that preserve audit evidence through review, decision and onboarding approval.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYC and KYB teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding workflows, supporting regulated digital asset businesses with risk-based review and decision audit trails.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle company registry checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates company registry data alongside UBO and sanctions screening, routing checks into connected, auditable onboarding cases for structured counterparty due diligence and risk-based decision-making.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed audit trails by recording decisions, case notes, provider outputs and rule applications to support onboarding actions remain transparent and reviewable for compliance teams.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with multiple KYC and KYB providers without replacing them, aggregating their outputs into one operational workflow tailored by jurisdiction, client type and internal policy.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their data to create controlled, explainable and auditable onboarding workflows above existing KYC and KYB services.
final_title: Preserve audit evidence for company registry checks
final_description: Review how SFTY structures company registry outputs into controlled onboarding evidence and audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
